---
title: "Presentations"
toc-location: right
page-layout: full
---

The list is not complete but I have presented at the following events

-   NordStat 2023. Gothenburg, Sweden. Contributed Talk.

-   BayesComp 2023. Levi, Finland. Poster.

-   German Probability and Statistics Days. Essen, Germany. Contributed Talk.

-   ICSDS 2022, Florence, Italy 2022. Student travel award given by the IMS.
